errors.disableAllMany: Failed to disable {{count}} of {{enabled}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

title: Scheduler Heartbeats
description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

confirm.disableAllOne: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
confirm.disableAllMany: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?

general.title: General
general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.

censorUsername.title: Censor username in logs
censorUsername.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

boardAssistant.title: Board Assistant
boardAssistant.description: Configure the instance-level assistant, manage channel binding, and review requests, memory, and internal threads.

errors.load: Failed to load board assistant settings.
errors.update: Failed to update board assistant settings.
errors.createBinding: Failed to create a binding session.
errors.confirmBinding: Failed to confirm the binding session.
errors.revokeBinding: Failed to revoke the active binding.
errors.approveMemory: Failed to approve the memory proposal.
errors.rejectMemory: Failed to reject the memory proposal.
errors.suppressMemory: Failed to update the memory state.
errors.updateThreadMode: Failed to update the thread mode.
errors.sendThreadMessage: Failed to send the thread message.

sections.controlsHint: Keep v1 focused on the assistant's global execution policy and proactive behavior.

summary.bindingHint: No active external founder channel is bound yet.
summary.pendingHint: Requests that still need confirmation, follow-up, or blocker resolution.
summary.memoryHint: Memory proposals waiting for founder review.

enabled.title: Enable Board Assistant
enabled.description: Turns the instance-level assistant on or off without changing its stored memory, bundle revisions, or channel plugin state.

autoExecution.title: Auto-execution mode
autoExecution.description: Choose how aggressively the assistant may move from understanding to execution once it recognizes a task intent.

proactiveBriefing.title: Allow proactive briefings
proactiveBriefing.description: Lets the assistant initiate high-value reminders, blocker escalations, and key event briefings.

queryGroup.title: Allow all-active-companies query group
queryGroup.description: Lets the assistant summarize across all active companies for query flows. This does not enable cross-company write execution.
queryGroup.toggleLabel: Toggle all active companies query group

binding.hint: Bind the assistant to a founder-owned external channel and keep the latest handshake visible in one place.
binding.sessionHint: Create a session, complete the channel handshake, then confirm it from the control plane.
binding.loadError: Failed to load the active binding.
binding.empty: No active external channel is currently bound.
binding.emptyTitle: No active founder channel binding yet

emptySteps.create: 1. Create a new WeChat binding session.
emptySteps.channel: 2. Finish the scan or code entry on the WeChat side.
emptySteps.confirm: 3. Return here and confirm so the assistant can take over the channel.

binding.sessionEmpty: No recent binding session has been created in this browser session.

requests.title: Founder requests
requests.hint: Review incoming structured requests before they become formal actions.
requests.empty: No requests have been captured yet.
requests.selectHint: Select a request to inspect its card, targets, and available actions.
requests.noTargets: No request targets have been recorded yet.
requests.notActionable: This request is not actionable in its current state. Review only.
requests.confirmNotesPlaceholder: Optional context to include before execution.
requests.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Optional reason sent back to the assistant.

memory.proposalsHint: Suggestions from the assistant or background memory processor.
memory.memoriesHint: Active and suppressed long-term memory available to the assistant.
memory.detailHint: Approve proposals carefully; suppress or delete memories that should stop influencing the assistant.
memory.noProposalSelected: Select a proposal to review it.
memory.noMemorySelected: Select a memory to manage it.

threads.title: Internal threads
threads.hint: Inspect assistant conversations with internal actors and switch thread mode when needed.
threads.empty: No internal threads have been created yet.
threads.selectHint: Select a thread to inspect recent messages and mode.
threads.messagesEmpty: No messages have been recorded for this thread yet.
threads.replyHint: This message will be written into the internal thread audit trail as a founder message.
threads.replyDisabled: v1 only allows manual posting in internal threads. External threads still flow through channel plugins.
threads.replyPlaceholder: Write what you want to add to the assistant or formal employee...

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

isolatedWorkspaces.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
isolatedWorkspaces.description: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.

autoRestart.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
autoRestart.description: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
